meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Solve Project Stalling
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to accelerate your MVP development from idea to revenue-ready in days.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' syndrome stems from architectural debt and scope creep. By deploying an Antigravity project template, you enforce a modular, revenue-first structure that limits feature bloat. Combine this with Claude Code’s autonomous execution to automate boilerplate, maintain codebase integrity, and drive your MVP to market with surgical precision.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with 90% finished projects—beautifully architected, feature-rich, and utterly unmarketable. You’ve been there: the initial momentum of the 'aha' moment hits a wall of complex state management, authentication hurdles, and the crushing weight of infinite to-do lists that keep you from shipping.

But shipping is the only feature that matters. To break the cycle, you need to stop writing code and start assembling systems. By utilizing the Antigravity project template alongside Claude Code, you shift from manual labor to architectural orchestration, forcing your MVP into a production-ready state before your motivation wanes.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a hardened production baseline that forces separation of concerns immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS scaffold with strict modular architecture, integrated Stripe billing, and Supabase auth.

steps.title: Define the Revenue-First Schema
steps.description: Focus only on the database models that directly support your core value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create database schema focusing on core user value: users, profiles, and subscription_tiers. Exclude secondary features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on core revenue models'

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your schema to API routes, eliminating manual CRUD boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate secure Next.js API routes for the defined schema using the Antigravity pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create API routes for all models with Zod validation'

steps.title: Integrate Core Business Logic
steps.description: Inject your unique value proposition into the scaffolded business logic layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core business logic service for processing user input into the primary product output.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement core service logic with error handling'

steps.title: Continuous Deployment Loop
steps.description: Set up an automated path to production so the feedback loop is instantaneous.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure CI/CD pipeline for Vercel deployment with automated testing triggered on push.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup deployment config and verify build'

pro_tips: Treat your codebase like a liability; if a feature doesn't directly contribute to ARR, delete it from the template.
Use Claude Code to audit your own code for 'over-engineering'—ask it to simplify any function longer than 20 lines.
Always build your auth layer first; if users can't sign up, your product doesn't exist.
Leverage Antigravity's built-in telemetry to track which features users actually click, not which ones you spent weeks building.
When stuck, force a 'hard reset' by asking Claude to document the current state and list the next three steps to a deployable milestone.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately implement a feedback collection mechanism and spend 80% of your time on distribution rather than feature iteration.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in a vacuum. Your customers are waiting, and your code should be working for you, not against you. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
